economic_notes: Nation operates two wholly-owned enterprises: 6173536 Manitoba Ltd. (o/a RSL Inc.) and Red Sucker Lake Air Services Ltd. Contingent liabilities include two legal claims by Arnason Industries Ltd. totalling approximately $4,572,412. Nation is economically dependent on ISC funding.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - auditors unable to obtain assurance over existence and completeness of accounts payable and accrued liabilities. Fiscal year is 2021 not 2024. Two wholly-owned enterprises consolidated: 6173536 Manitoba Ltd. (RSL Inc.) and Red Sucker Lake Air Services Ltd. Investments accounted for under modified equity method. Two legal claims by Arnason Industries Ltd. totalling ~$4.57M outstanding. Capital segment includes $3,435,000 transfer from construction in progress (Health Centre/Nursing Station) to tangible capital assets. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided.
